# MDE v1.6.7

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed Automation Center discovery so stale cached local discovered sources no longer suppress fresh discovery runs forever.
- Cached local task sources are now revalidated before reuse: missing files, files moved under `done/` or `archived/`, no-longer-READY files, unsafe paths, symlinks, and sources outside the current Automation Flow match rules are ignored.
- Valid cached sources still prevent duplicate discovery, and valid remote Issue/MR sources without local file paths remain usable.
- Refreshed local cached sources now recompute source snapshot identity from the current file content, title, tags, and task metadata before projection or execution.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Updated release metadata to `1.6.7` for the root workspace, desktop app, and changed private `@mde/automation-flow` package.
- Added a dedicated desktop automation service for cached discovered-source validation.
- Reused the shared automation-flow discovery hash path for currentized cached local sources.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for stale cache filtering, valid-cache reuse, path safety, active scan-rule matching, snapshot hash refresh, and Run History refresh behavior.

## Documentation/User Manual

- Updated the Chinese Automation Center manual to explain discovery-cache validation and the Run History entry created after stale cache is discarded.
- `pnpm run docs:build` is required for this release because `user-manual/` changed.

## Verification

- Release verification for `v1.6.7`:
  - `pnpm --filter @mde/automation-flow test`
  - `pnpm --filter @mde/automation-flow typecheck`
  - `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop typecheck`
  - `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test`
  - `pnpm run lint`
  - `pnpm run typecheck`
  - `pnpm run build`
  - `pnpm run test:unit`
  - `pnpm run test:integration`
  - `pnpm run test:e2e`
  - `pnpm run docs:build`
  - `git diff --check`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions Release workflow publishes macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer artifacts for `v1.6.7`.
- macOS signing and notarization remain optional for the no-paid-account release path; unsigned macOS artifacts are expected when signing secrets are not configured.
